meaning: n.庞大固埃(讽刺小说<<巨人传>>中的人物)
examples: Gargantua And Pantagruel emancipated the personality and the epic distance.
Gargantua and pantagruel emancipated the personality and the epic distance because it inverted the position of Latin and contained Bacchus spirit.
And, as Judge Bridlegoose explains in Rabelais's Pantagruel, it is important to spend many hours hefting law books and unfolding documents, if you want your clients to feel reassured.
